title: User humidifier comfort preferences and device status
summary: The user prefers 50% or higher ambient humidity for comfort, and the user's Mijia Smart Anti-bacterial Humidifier 2 still has persistent connection or functional issues that prevent successful automatic activation.
details: User requires 50%+ ambient humidity for comfort
Mijia Smart Anti-bacterial Humidifier 2 cannot be activated automatically due to persistent connection/functional issues
